summary: Created 6-phase sequential plan to fix untl/snce argument order convention across cslib (7 files). Phases: (1) semantic root fix in Truth.lean, (2) derived operators in both Formula.lean files, (3) axiom abbreviations + ProofSystem.lean, (4) Temporal axiom constructors, (5) TemporalDerived proof re-derivation, (6) full build verification. Key insight: F_mono/P_mono/G_distribution proofs need BX3 instead of BX2G under new convention. Estimated 4 hours total.

artifacts.summary: Comprehensive file-by-file change list with risk analysis and semantic verification of each axiom
6-phase plan to swap untl/snce args from (guard,event) to (event,guard) across Truth.lean, both Formula.lean files, Axioms.lean, ProofSystem.lean, Temporal Axioms.lean, and TemporalDerived.lean
